🎯 Set My Plan
Fat Loss (Standard)
TDEE − 400
Moderate deficit for steady fat loss.
Protein: 1.0 g/lb · Fat: 25%
Best for sustainable cutting while keeping muscle.
Fat Loss (Aggressive)
TDEE − 600
Large deficit for rapid fat loss.
Protein: 1.1 g/lb · Fat: 22%
Use short-term. High protein to preserve muscle in bigger deficit.
Maintain
TDEE ± 0
Eat at maintenance to hold current weight.
Protein: 0.9 g/lb · Fat: 28%
Balanced macros for body recomposition.
Gain
TDEE + 350
Moderate surplus for steady weight gain.
Protein: 0.85 g/lb · Fat: 28%
Good for adding size with controlled fat gain.
Lean Bulk
TDEE + 200
Small surplus to minimize fat gain.
Protein: 1.0 g/lb · Fat: 25%
Ideal for slow, clean gains with minimal fat.
Bulk
TDEE + 500
Large surplus for maximum growth.
Protein: 0.8 g/lb · Fat: 30%
Best for hard-gainers or off-season mass building.
Performance
TDEE + 100
Slight surplus to fuel training.
Protein: 0.95 g/lb · Fat: 25%
Optimized for athletic output, recovery & endurance.
